goal: exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { k0.is_positive and k1.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, k0) implies f(x0).abs <= k1 } }

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Real](g(x))
function(x0: Real) { not x0.abs.is_negative }(lib(functions).identity_fn(g(x)))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x0 + x1 < x2 + x1 or x0 < x2 }(g(x).abs, Real.1, Real.0)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 or x0 < x1 }[Real](g(x).abs + Real.1, Real.0 + Real.1)
function(x0: Real) { not x0 < Real.0 or x0.is_negative }(g(x).abs)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 - x1 != Real.0 or x0 = x1 }(Real.0 + Real.1, Real.1)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 - x1 = x0 }(Real.0, Real.1)
function(x0: lib(rat).Rat) { not x0.is_positive or lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(x0).is_positive }(lib(rat).Rat.1)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 = x1 <= x0 }[Real](g_bound, Real.1)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not x0 <= x1 or not x0.is_positive or x1.is_positive }(Real.1, g_bound)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or not x0 < x1 }[Real](g(x).abs, g_bound)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }(g(x).abs, g_bound)
function(x0: Real) { x0 < x0 + Real.1 }(g(x).abs)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and k0 + k0 < eps }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and k0 * g_bound < eps2 }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and k0 * f_bound < eps2 }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, eps_a) }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(g, x, k0, eps_b) }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and k0 < delta_f and k0 < delta_g }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and k0 < delta_fg and k0 < delta_b }

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x0 < x1 or not x2 <= x0 or x2 < x1 }(delta_fg, delta_f, delta)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0 <= x1 }[Real](delta, delta_fg)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x0 < x1 or not x2 <= x0 or x2 < x1 }(delta_fg, delta_g, delta)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0 <= x1 }[Real](delta, delta_fg)

goal: continuous_condition(f, x, delta_f, eps_a) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, delta_f) implies f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps_a) }

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta_f, f, eps_a)

goal: continuous_condition(g, x, delta_g, eps_b) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, delta_g) implies g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps_b) }

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta_g, g, eps_b)
continuous_condition(f, x, delta_f, eps_a)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta_f) or f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps_a) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta_f) and not f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps_a)) })
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta_f) and not f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps_a)) }(y)
not y.is_close(x, delta_f) or f(y).is_close(f(x), eps_a)
continuous_condition(g, x, delta_g, eps_b)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta_g) or g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps_b) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta_g) and not g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps_b)) })
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta_g) and not g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps_b)) }(y)
not y.is_close(x, delta_g) or g(y).is_close(g(x), eps_b)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta_b) or f(x0).abs <= f_bound } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta_b) and not f(x0).abs <= f_bound) }(y)
not y.is_close(x, delta_b) or f(y).abs <= f_bound

goal: (f(y) * g(y)).is_close(f(x) * g(x), f_bound * eps_b + eps_a * g_bound)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(eps_b, f_bound)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not x0 < x1 or not x2 < x3 or x0 + x2 < x1 + x3 }(f_bound * eps_b, eps2, eps_a * g_bound, eps2)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x0 < x1 or not x1 <= x2 or x0 < x2 }(total, eps2 + eps2, eps)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0 <= x1 }[Real](eps2 + eps2, eps)
function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[Real, Real](f, y, g)
function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[Real, Real](f, x, g)

goal: pointwise_mul(f, g, y).is_close(pointwise_mul(f, g, x), eps)
continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta, pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), eps)
not continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps) or forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or pointwise_mul(f, g, x0).is_close(pointwise_mul(f, g, x), eps) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta) and not pointwise_mul(f, g, x0).is_close(pointwise_mul(f, g, x), eps)) or not continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps) or not x0.is_close(x, delta) or pointwise_mul(f, g, x0).is_close(pointwise_mul(f, g, x), eps) })
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or pointwise_mul(f, g, x0).is_close(pointwise_mul(f, g, x), eps) } or continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, delta) and not pointwise_mul(f, g, k0).is_close(pointwise_mul(f, g, x), eps) } or continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, delta) and not pointwise_mul(f, g, k0).is_close(pointwise_mul(f, g, x), eps) }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(x, delta) and not pointwise_mul(f, g, w0).is_close(pointwise_mul(f, g, x), eps) }
w0.is_close(x, delta)
not pointwise_mul(f, g, w0).is_close(pointwise_mul(f, g, x), eps)
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or pointwise_mul(f, g, x0).is_close(pointwise_mul(f, g, x), eps) }(w0)

goal: delta.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, eps) }

p.c: function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, eps)) }(delta)

goal: continuous_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, x0) } }

p.c: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = continuous_at(x0, x1) }(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x)

goal: not forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, x0) } }

p.c: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, k0) } }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, w0) } }
w0.is_positive
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, w0) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, w0)) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, w0) or not x0.is_positive })
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, x0) } }(w0)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, w0) }
let w1: Real satisfy { w1.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, w1, w0) }
w1.is_positive
continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, w1, w0)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, w0)) }(w1)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, k0)) } }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, bad_eps) }

p.c: function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, x0) } }(bad_eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, bad_eps) }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, w0, bad_eps) }
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, bad_eps)) }(w0)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(f)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(g)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { not continuous(x0) or continuous_at(x0, x1) }(f, x)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { not continuous(x0) or continuous_at(x0, x1) }(g, x)
exists(k0: Real) { not continuous_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { not continuous_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), w0) }
function(x0: Real) { continuous_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0) }(w0)
